titleStmt.title: SII 17.183: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 183. (A.R. No. 163 of 1904.) TIRUPPĀLAPPANDAL, CUDDALORE TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north base of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Madhyasthanāthēśvara temple.

Kampaṇa Uḍaiyar. Ś. 1291: 1369 A.D. Kampaṇa Uḍaiyar is referred to as the son of Vīra Bokkaṇa Uḍaiyar. The details of date given viz. Śaka 1291, Saumya, Tulā śu. 11, Friday, corresponds to 1369 A.D. October 12. (See No. 179 above).

This inscription records an agreement by the Nāṭṭavar of Tiruvāyppāḍi in Magadaimaṇḍalam to conduct the 7th day festival for god Tirunāgīśvaram-uḍaiya Nāyaṉār of Tiruppālaippandal. Vaṇḍuvarāpati-samayakkaṇakkan figures as the signatory of the record.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaleśvaran harirājavibhāṭan bhāṣaikkut tappuvarāyarakaṇṭaṉ catussamudrādhipati śrīvīrapokkaṇa Uṭaiyār kumārar kampaṇa Uṭaiyar
pṛthivirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 100 2 10 91 ṉ mel cellāniṉṟa saumya varuṣattu tulānāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu Ekādaśiyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum pe
pālaippantal Uṭaiyār tirunākiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku Eḻāntirunāḷ makataimaṇṭalattu tiruvāyppāṭi nāṭṭavar Upayam naṭattakkaṭavatākavum tiruṉāḷ naṭa
kku tūṇippatakku ney kuṭukka kaṭavatākavum Ippaṭikku candrādityavaraiyum cella kal veṭṭik kuṭuttom Ivvaṇṭuvarāpati camayakkaṇakkan Eḻuttu . Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai[ ]
Digital edition of SII 17.183 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
